summary: Vaanix iteration 2 (passwordless email+OTP) tested end-to-end. Backend: 15/15 pytest tests pass — request-otp (new user / missing display_name 400 / cooldown 429 / dev_otp returned), verify-otp (success + email_verified, 5 wrong attempts each show 'attempts left' then OTP invalidated), /auth/me with bearer, legacy endpoints (/auth/login, /auth/register, /auth/forgot-password, /auth/reset-password) all return 404, seeded users (admin/aarav/meera) cleaned up, and chat APIs (create direct conversation, send & list messages, list users) work with the OTP-issued bearer token. Frontend: welcome → email → OTP screen → /(tabs)/chats works on mobile viewport (390x844). Wrong code shows otp-error toast and clears digits; correct code auto-submits and navigates to chats; resend countdown starts at 60s and is disabled. Logout from settings clears JWT and returns user to welcome (after confirm modal). Old test_vaanix_api.py rewritten for OTP flow.

issues: Stale copy: shows 'Demo users available: aarav@vaanix.app, meera@vaanix.app' — those seeded users were retired in this iteration. Update the empty-state hint.
Confirm modal Cancel/Log out buttons lack testIDs (e.g., logout-confirm, logout-cancel). Currently must locate by text — fragile for tests.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow); expo-av deprecated in SDK 54 (migrate to expo-audio/expo-video). Non-blocking.

action_items: Remove or update the 'Demo users available: aarav@vaanix.app, meera@vaanix.app' hint on the empty Chats screen — those accounts no longer exist.
Add testIDs to the logout confirm modal buttons (logout-confirm, logout-cancel) for stable automation.
Track expo-av and shadow* deprecations before next Expo SDK bump.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 818 lines — consider splitting auth/users/conversations/ws into routers as it grows.
OTP cooldown lookup (db.otp_codes.find_one sort by created_at) relies on string ISO timestamps; fine today but consider storing native datetimes consistently.

request-otp returns 'is_new_user' computed as `email_verified is False` — this is true for already-existing-but-never-verified users too, which may be slightly misleading semantics, but currently unused by the UI.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/conftest.py (rewritten for OTP — removed admin/aarav/meera password fixtures)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (welcome → email → OTP → chats → settings → logout → welcome)

seed_data_creation: Tests create unique TEST_<uuid>@vaanix.app users per run (cooldown is 60s/email so unique emails are required). Safe — all prefixed for cleanup if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend env var is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Backend is at https://divine-chat-14.preview.emergentagent.com/api. DEV_RETURN_OTP=true makes request-otp include dev_otp in the response — that is the source of truth in tests since Resend test mode only delivers to arijitdas199@gmail.com. OTP cooldown is 60s per email — always use a fresh uuid email per test. Run tests with: `cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_vaanix_api.py -v`. Logout confirm modal needs the Locator('text=Log out').last to bypass the row label.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no functional bugs found this iteration. Two UX/copy follow-ups noted (stale demo-user hint on empty Chats; missing testIDs on logout confirm modal).
